name: Focaccia (Italian Flatbread) ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and add them in order into the breadmaker, selecting "white bread, manual" setting. Start the cycle.
2. Remove the dough when the cycle is complete.
OR
3. In a large bowl, mix together 1 1/2 cups of flour, rosemary, salt, and yeast.
4. Add 3 tablespoons of olive oil and hot water to the dry ingredients. Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
5. Continue beating on medium speed for 1 minute, scraping the bowl frequently.
6. Stir in enough remaining flour until the dough is easy to handle.
7. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 5 to 8 minutes or until smooth and elastic.
8. Place the dough in a greased bowl, turning the greased side up. Cover and let rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size (the dough is ready if an indentation remains when touched).
9. Punch down the dough.
10. Brush a 12-inch pizza pan or large cookie sheet with olive oil. Press the dough into the pan or flatten it out into a 12-inch circle on the cookie sheet.
11. Make indentations about 2 inches apart in the dough using your fingers. Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with pepper.
12. Let the dough rise uncovered in a warm place for 30 minutes.
13. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
14. Bake the focaccia for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown. Brush with additional oil before serving.
